A template helper without any template set is a contradiction.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- web/web.go --
package web

import "net/http"

//fabrik:templates:func
func Shout(s string) string { return s }

//fabrik:http GET /
func Home(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/diags --
error: web/web.go:5:1: //fabrik:templates:func without any //fabrik:templates declaration
  help: declare a template set the helper can be parsed into
